calendar.matters:
Petition For An Accounting; For Relief For Breach Of Trust; For Damages; And For Instructions
Off Calendar Oct-26-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Pauline Berkes, petitioner in pro per.

Ms. Berkes informed the Court that she had spoken at length with Mr. Rosen, that she had received an accounting, and that the parties had agreed to settle the matter outside of court. She requested that the matter go off calendar, and the Court ordered the petition off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not reported)

Petition For An Accounting; For Relief For Breach Of Trust; For Damages; And For Instructions
Off Calendar Aug-03-2016 Continued To Oct-26-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Pauline Berkes in Propria Persona. Joshua Rosen (trustee) in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that this is a petition to compel an accounting and distribution. Mr. Rosen stated that he would like a continuance, that he is not a professional trustee, that this is a complicated trust and has taken a lot of his time and that he needs a continuance to finish up. The Court stated that this needs to be a high priority. Mr. Rosen stated that he will hire a professional to do the accounting, confirmed that he has not hired one yet and that he wants a continuance to the end of the year. The Court stated that it will not grant a long continuance, that the petitioner has a right to an accounting and that it should have already been done. Ms. Berkes stated that she has been waiting for over 5 years, that she graciously agreed to many continuances and that she is not inclined to wait further. The Court stated that it will issue an order requiring a satisfactory probate accounting no later than October 20, 2016. The Court continued the Second Amended Petition for an Accounting and for Relief for Breach of trust to October 26, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 on all other issues presented in the petition and stated that Ms. Berkes is welcome to submit a form of order regarding both dates.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
